est. together

happy
birthday
sakhi!

Another trip around the sun for the person who makes every ordinary day feel like a good one. This little corner of the internet is just for you.

us, on a good night
✦

a little bit
about us

Somewhere between the late-night calls, the terrible jokes, and all the little adventures, you became the best part of my everyday. You show up for everyone around you with your whole heart, and I feel lucky every single day that I get to be one of the people you show up for.

Here's to another year of finding new places to explore, new photos to take, and new reasons to laugh way too hard at things that probably aren't that funny.

the biggest highlight reel

caught mid-laugh
home is a hug
reserved, always
one more hug

a few things about you

☀

your laugh

Loud, unfiltered, and somehow always exactly what a room needs.

✎

your heart

You notice the people around you before they even have to ask.

✦

your energy

Turns any random Tuesday into something worth remembering.

✦

happy birthday,
my favourite person

I hope today feels as good as you make every other day feel for the people around you. Thank you for your patience, your softness, and for putting up with me on my worst days and celebrating with me on my best ones.

Here's to more trips, more photos, more terrible selfies, and more years of us.

— Pranav
happy birthday, sakhi
i love you, always made with love, for sakhi's birthday
